document_chunk.description: Chunk-level lexical negative quote/snippet fallback surface.

negative_phrase_absent.description: Quoted phrases that do not occur verbatim in the corpus and require lexical fallback rather than exact hit recovery.

quote_snippet_negative.description: Quoted phrase-absent fallback cases where lexical retrieval should still find the intended chunk.

quoted_absent_fallback.description: Quoted queries with wording or punctuation drift that should still retrieve the intended chunk via fallback behavior.
